message:
feat(test): expand proptest coverage for process_triage, simulation, tantivy_reindex

- process_triage (30→35): ClassifiedProcess strategy, JSON key tests,
  pane_id skip_serializing_if, TriageAction tagged enum, Display matches serde
- simulation (30→38): ExpectationKind/ScenarioPane strategies, serde roundtrips,
  FontAtlasCachePolicy/FontRenderPrepMetrics/ResizeQueueMetrics tests
- tantivy_reindex (33→40): IntegrityReport/OffsetMismatch/CheckedRange strategies
  and serde roundtrip tests

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
